repo.description: C++/Python implementation of Nearest Neighbor Descent for efficient approximate nearest neighbor search

terms.context_snippet: Nearest Neighbor Descent (nndescent) is a C++ implementation of the nearest neighbor descent algorithm, designed for efficient and accurate approximate nearest neighbor search.
